ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Date the next service is due */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Service center where the vehicle is maintained */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* References the owners table */,
  "current_odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Current odometer reading for maintenance tracking */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vehicle inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic test */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the test is performed on */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diagnostic test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnostic test */,
  "pending_dtc" INTEGER /* Indicates if a pending DTC is set */,
  "test_failed_this_cycle" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test failed in the current operation cycle */,
  "test_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test was completed */,
  "malfunction_detected" INTEGER /* Indicates if a malfunction was detected */,
  "clear_diagnostic_info_called" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ClearDiagnosticInformation service was called */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Current status of the test (e.g., '0' for no malfunction, '1' for malfunction) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test result */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions based on the test result */,
  "test_performed_by" INTEGER /* Technician who performed the test */,
  "test_performed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was performed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the test status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_tests_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_tests_test_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("test_performed_by") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Owner's name */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Owner's contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Technician's name */,
  "role" TEXT /* Technician's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_centers" (
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Service center name */,
  "address" TEXT /* Service center address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance date */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnostic test */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
